overall.description: Gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a female character exploring a dark medical facility at night with a flashlight. The character moves through dimly lit corridors, a storage room, reception area, and exits into an overgrown garden with a gazebo and pond. The atmosphere is tense and atmospheric with high-quality cinematic lighting.

The environment transitions from clinical storage spaces to administrative areas as the character approaches a reception desk visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the reception area featuring a wooden desk with potted plants and red waiting chairs, then exits the facility through glass doors. The transition from the lit interior to the dark exterior garden marks a shift from artificial to natural night lighting.

segments.scene_description: The character explores a dark, atmospheric garden outside the facility, illuminated only by flashlight and scattered ground lanterns. The scene features a white wooden gazebo, an arched footbridge over a misty pond, and dense overgrown vegetation creating a mysterious nighttime environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark hospital corridor into a brightly lit medical storage room and back into the dim administrative halls. It begins in the oppressive darkness of a corridor, where a flashlight beam guides the character toward the sudden glare of a fluorescently lit storage area. As the camera enters this space, the environment shifts to a clinical setting featuring green floor tiles, metal shelving units, and a pharmacy counter with a purple office chair. The scene then transitions back into the shadows as the character exits the room, moving past a wheelchair and a wall mural. Finally, the camera navigates the darkening hallway, shifting from the sterile storage zone toward a distant reception desk.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sterile interior of a medical facility into a mysterious, overgrown nighttime garden. It begins in a reception area, passing a wooden desk with potted plants and red waiting chairs before moving through glass doors. As the character exits, the artificial interior lighting shifts abruptly to the deep shadows of the outdoors, where the environment becomes dominated by natural night tones. The scene then expands into a dark garden illuminated by a flashlight and scattered ground lanterns, weaving through dense vegetation toward a white wooden gazebo. Finally, the camera glides across an arched footbridge over a misty pond, completing the transition into the atmospheric wilderness.
